title: Ethersquid

The '''ethersquid''' was a type of [[Squid/Legends|squid]] that was one of the things for which [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="NJOS" /> of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Circarpous sector/Legends|Circarpous sector]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Gyndine system/Legends|Gyndine system]]</ref> with [[Forest/Legends|forests]] and [[Water/Legends|lakes]] on its surface,<ref name="NJO">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''</ref> was known for. It was a [[Death/Legends|deadly]] creature<ref name="NJOS" /> that could endanger [[Starship/Legends|starships]] over Gyndine,<ref name="Gamer8">{{GamerCite|8|I, Yuuzhan Vong}}</ref> and it had suckers that left marks comparable to those left on the body of<ref name="DES" /> the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]<ref name="DB">{{DB|character|bobafett|Fett, Boba}}</ref> [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] after he had emerged from the [[Stomach/Legends|stomach]] of a [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]]<ref name="DES" /> [[Arthropod/Legends|arthropod]]<ref name="NEGAS">''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref> on<ref name="DES" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] planet<ref name="NEGAS" /> [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="DES" />

{{RPGseed}}
In the aftermath of the [[Battle of Gyndine]],<ref name="Gamer8" /> an engagement fought as part of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extragalactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> a team of Yuuzhan Vong aboard a ship in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] over Gyndine were assisting with pacification efforts there. A [[Yorik-vec assault cruiser|''Yorik-vec'' assault cruiser]] of [[Domain Yaght]], a rival of the team's own [[Domain]], led a group of ethersquids to attack the other ship, which eventually crashed on Gyndine.<ref name="Gamer8" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Dark_Empire_Sourcebook.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The ethersquid was introduced in the ''Dark Empire Sourcebook''.]]
The ethersquid was first mentioned in "[[The Ordeal of Boba Fett]]," a short companion narrative included in [[Michael Allen Horne]]'s ''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'', which was published in [[1993]] by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="DES" />

"[[I, Yuuzhan Vong]]," a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] source article written by [[Daniel Wallace]] and published in the [[Star Wars Gamer 8|eighth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine<ref name="Gamer8" /> on [[December 21]], [[2001]],<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20011210.html|text=Yuuzhan Vong Invade ''Gamer'' #8}}</ref> included an adventure seed for use with [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''. The scenario suggests that the player characters' starship is brought down onto Gyndine either due to the damage by ethersquids or due to a ranged attack by the Domain Yaght [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]]. This article assumes the scenario plays out as described.<ref name="Gamer8" />
